title: Phase 0 — Confirm & Specify
description: Close existential/decision risks; ratify spec + schemas; stand up build infra. Gate: M-001 green, M-002 verdict, M-010 ratified, infra in CI.

title: Phase 1 — Minimal Viable Core
description: Auditable kernel: Core IR + reference interpreter, binary/ternary, certified binary<->ternary swap, 1-2 VSA ops with bounds, minimal toolchain, interp<->AOT equivalence. Gate: SC-1/3/4, SC-2 for shipped ops, NFR-7.

title: Phase 2 — Full Unification & Verified Swaps
description: All four substrates co-equal; lossy swaps certified per-swap; verified-numerics checker; selection policy + packing selector. Gate: SC-2 all ops, SC-3 global, cert overhead within budget.

title: Phase 3 — Tooling, Projections & Acceleration
description: Dual-intelligibility tooling, JIT, factorization, BitNet acceleration, native-ternary forward path. Gate: SC-5a/b, JIT NFR-7 + speedup, projections validated.

title: Phase 4 — Interpreted↔Compiled ABI, Hot-Inject & AOT-Fragment Completion
description: The interpreted↔compiled ABI (ADR-016) + hot-inject/recompile (ADR-017); AOT env-machine completion over the full v0 calculus incl. stack-robustness + dynamic budgets (M-342/M-347/M-349, DN-05); mutual recursion (M-343, RFC-0001 r5 FixGroup); ambient representation (M-344, RFC-0012); structured diagnostics + reified error policy and declarative recovery/bounded effects (M-345, RFC-0013/0014); stdlib roadmap (M-346). Gate: NFR-7 three-way differential holds across the calculus; budgets are explicit/never-silent (G2); kernel stays small (KC-3).

title: Phase 5 — Self-Hosting & Core Library
description: ANTICIPATED roadmap anchor (not yet ratified — scope firms at the Phase-4 gate). Write the standard library and the diagnostics/recovery runtime in Mycelium-lang itself (dogfooding; the 'free of other languages' goal): decompose the M-346 stdlib epic; self-host the RFC-0013/0014 diagnostics + recovery (per their self-hosting trajectory). Gate: a stdlib module self-hosts with the guarantee/EXPLAIN contract every op must meet (G2, VR-5, KC-3, ADR-003).

title: Phase 6 — Native Acceleration & Deployment
description: ANTICIPATED roadmap anchor (not yet ratified — scope firms at the prior gate). Native MLIR→LLVM codegen for the full calculus incl. data/closure (M-348, RFC-0004 §2, ADR-009); BitNet / native-ternary acceleration (Foundation §6 Phase-3 acceleration carried forward); deployable Spore units (ADR-013); production hardening. Gate: native path holds the NFR-7 differential + a speedup; a deployable Spore (VR-4 no-opaque-lowering across all backends).

title: Phase 7 — Runtime & Concurrency Execution Model (RFC-0008)
description: ANTICIPATED roadmap anchor (not yet ratified — scope firms at the Phase-4 gate; sequencing relative to Phases 5-6 is a maintainer gate decision, this runtime track may precede self-hosting). The forward home for the runtime/concurrency model the RFC-0013/0014 work pointed to: RFC-0008 ratification of RT1-RT7 (M-355); lifting RFC-0014's single-task boundary to per-task budgets, cancellation, and reclaim bounded-cascade supervision (M-356, RFC-0014 §8 / Erlang-OTP grounding); the RT2 deterministic-fragment runtime + reference-sequentialization differential (M-357, RFC-0008 §4.7, the natural successor to the L1 track). The §4.5 runtime vocabulary (hypha/fuse/xloc/cyst/graft/forage/backbone/mesh/tier/reclaim) decomposes into per-construct tasks at the Phase-7 gate. NB: M-353/M-354 (the shovel-ready RFC-0008 integration over already-landed machinery) stay in the active Phase 4; the DN-06 lexicon migration (M-358) and the structured nodule header + phylum manifest (M-359) also live here. Gate: RFC-0008 Accepted; the RT2 differential holds (NFR-7-equivalent); runtime guarantees tagged honestly (RT5/VR-5); kernel stays small (KC-3).

title: Phase 8 — Toolchain & Release Engineering
description: ANTICIPATED roadmap anchor (not yet ratified — scope firms at a later gate). The full Mycelium 'full-fat' toolchain the maintainer names as a prod-release requirement (2026-06-16), beyond LSP+interpreter+AOT: a formatter (mycfmt), correctness/type checking, error/issue checking AND auto-fixing (RFC-0013 diagnostics + RFC-0014 recovery surfaced as actionable fixes), security checks (secrets/supply-chain/`wild`-audit), and the packaging/metadata layer (the M-359 nodule header + phylum manifest + spore publishing). Principles non-negotiable: never-silent (G2), honest per-op guarantees (VR-5), no black boxes / EXPLAIN, small auditable kernel — the toolchain lives ABOVE it (KC-3), content-addressed (ADR-003); Rust-first now (ADR-007), Mycelium-lang eventually. Full-fat is a release gate, not a v0 deliverable. Decomposes into per-tool tasks at its gate (M-361 the epic anchor). Gate: the suite runs green in CI parity (just check) with the honesty/EXPLAIN contract every tool must meet.
